description: Kneel and roll the wheel forward, extending your body, then pull back using your core.
name: Ab Wheel Rollout

description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, squat down until thighs are parallel, then stand up.
name: Bodyweight Squats

description: Hang with an underhand grip and pull your chin above the bar.
name: Chin-ups

description: Grip parallel bars, lower your body until your upper arms are parallel, then press up.
name: Dips

description: Lie on your back with knees bent and drive your hips up by squeezing your glutes.
name: Glute Bridge

description: Hang from a bar and raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground or higher.
name: Hanging Leg Raise

description: Hang beneath a bar set at waist height and pull your chest up to the bar.
name: Inverted Row

description: Start in a push-up position with hips raised high and press your head towards the floor.
name: Pike Push-ups

description: Hang with an overhand grip and pull your chin above the bar.
name: Pull-ups

description: Place your hands shoulder-width apart on the floor, lower your chest down, then push back up.
name: Push-ups

description: Lie on your side propped on your forearm, keeping your body in a straight line.
name: Side Plank

description: Lie on your back with knees bent and curl your torso up off the floor.
name: Sit-ups
